title: fiutiu additions
body:
Inspired by lovecraftian themes, this is an addon mod for the Fiutiu modpacks and projects, adding things such as:

**Blocks and biomes**

Currently only includes a bloodsoaked biome fleshyscablands with accompanying blocks
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7592d28ba14c3d6399c990155ccafbbf7970531e.png)

**Entities**

The white and red bloodcell that attacks players.
![Red Bloodcell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5082ae0f3da31190bf87f5e6d80599e16b2e9a5b_0.webp)![White Bloodcell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e9242abb33d29e5c97cd9264c35b02ef124b955.png)

**and other tweaks.**
Currently it add's a new mob and biome to accompany it but there's a clear intent to add more.


made with mcreator
